title: Hungerless
description: Disables the hunger system and bar. Food directly heals you instead. Easy to install.
body:
This is a simple mod that disables the hunger mechanic and hides the hunger bar, nothing more.
Consuming food will now directly heal you instead of slow regeneration.

And also, this won't be a pain to install compared to some of these other no-hunger mods.

![Hunger Bar is hidden and disabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88a00ce8d7642c4a7b6d459366520fc7da96dde0.jpeg)
